name: Name:
name-tooltip: The name of the folder. Supports Unicode (CJK, Cyrillic, etc). Not allowed: < > & " ' \ : and control characters.
icon-tooltip:
A link to an image (Supported formats)
It also supports data:image/{type};base64, format (Convert image to data strings)
Thread with some icons.
You can click the icon of the Docker/VM to set the folder icon.
preview-tooltip: Choose how containers/VMs are displayed in the folder preview row.
preview-hover-tooltip: Hides the preview until you hover over the folder row.
preview-update-tooltip: Highlights container names in orange when an update is available.
preview-grayscale-tooltip: Displays container icons in grayscale instead of color.
preview-webui-tooltip: Adds a globe icon next to containers that have a WebUI configured.
preview-logs-tooltip: Adds a log icon next to each container for quick access to logs.
preview-console-tooltip: Adds a console icon next to each container for quick terminal access.
preview-vertical-bars-tooltip: Shows vertical divider lines between containers in the preview row.
context-tooltip: Controls the detail popup when clicking a container. Default shows basic info, Advanced shows stats with CPU/memory graphs.
context-trigger-tooltip: How the advanced preview opens. Click requires clicking a container, Hover opens on mouse-over.
context-graph-tooltip: Choose which real-time graphs to display. Combined shows CPU and memory on one chart, Split shows them separately.
context-graph-time-tooltip: How many seconds of history the graph displays. Default is 60 (1 minute).
border-tooltip: Draws a border around the preview area.
border-color-tooltip:
Set the color of the preview border.
The button will reset to the current font color.
bars-color-tooltip:
Set the color of the vertical bars between containers.
The button will reset to the current font color.
preview-overflow-tooltip:
Controls what happens when there are too many containers to fit in the preview area.
Default: Extra containers are hidden when the row is too narrow.
Expand row: The preview area grows taller to show all containers on multiple lines.
Scroll: A horizontal scrollbar appears to access all containers.
row-separator-tooltip: Shows a faint horizontal line between rows when the preview expands to multiple lines.
separator-color-tooltip:
Set the color of the row separator line.
The button will reset to the current font color.
lock-colors-tooltip:
When enabled, this folder's border, vertical bar, and separator colors cannot be overridden by CSS presets, global defaults, or Apply Defaults to All Folders.
When disabled (default), these sources can override the colors.
update-column-tooltip: Hides the Version/update column for this folder's row, freeing up horizontal space.
expand-tab-tooltip: The folder will be expanded (showing child containers) by default when the Docker/VMs page loads.
expand-dashboard-tooltip: The folder will be expanded by default when the Dashboard page loads.
regex-tooltip:
Automatically include containers whose names match a text pattern.
plex — matches any container with 'plex' in the name
^media- — matches containers starting with 'media-'
arr$ — matches containers ending with 'arr' (sonarr, radarr, etc.)
Test your pattern here.
Editing this field will reset manual container selections below.
order-tooltip: Drag and drop rows to reorder containers. Check 'Included' to add a container, 'Hide Preview' to exclude it from the preview row. Editing the regex will reset manual selections.
custom-actions-folder-tooltip:
Name: Just the name of the action.
Type: Type of the action.
  • Standard - normal action on docker containers (start, stop, ...).
  • Custom - will execute a User Scripts (User Scripts plugin required).
Action: Action to be performed.
  • Cycle - cycle between two states.
  • Set - set a state.
  • Restart - basic restart.
Containers: A comma (,) separated list of containers.
Script: Just the name of the script (Names are case sensitive and need white spaces).
Arguments: Arguments passed to the script.
Sync: Whether to run the script in background or not.
Icon: Icon of the action, leave empty for default.
custom-action: Add a custom action
custom-action-tooltip: Add custom buttons to the folder's context menu for advanced operations.
default-action-tooltip: Removes the default action buttons (start, stop, restart) from the folder's context menu.
folderview3-desc: FolderView3 lets you create folders for grouping Dockers and VMs together to help with organization. Especially useful if you're using docker-compose. Getting Started: A new button named "Add Folder" will appear at the bottom of the docker/VM tab next to "Add Container/VM".
preview-text-width-tooltip: Limits the maximum width of container names in the preview, truncating long names with an ellipsis. Enter a CSS value like 80px or 6rem. Leave blank for no limit.
override-default-actions-tooltip: Replaces the folder's default right-click menu with only the custom actions defined below.
folder-webui-url-tooltip: The URL to open when clicking the WebUI button in the folder context menu.
css-advanced-help: Add custom CSS rules. Variables from the Variables tab are applied first.
backup-help: Export all folder configurations as a backup, or import from a previous export.
folder-defaults-info: Default settings for new folders and any folder set to use defaults
css-themes-help: Import community CSS themes from GitHub. One theme active at a time. CSS variables always apply on top.
backup-full-hint: Includes all folders, settings, CSS config, and custom themes in one file.
css-url-warning: Your CSS contains url() references. Verify these URLs are trusted before saving.
